name: Shrimp Lejon
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill the shrimp with horseradish.
2. Wrap each shrimp tightly with a slice of bacon.
3. Secure the wrapped shrimp with a wooden toothpick.
4. Bake at 375°F until brown.
5. Place on a warmed platter and serve with Sauce Remoulade.
6. Serves 2 as an appetizer.
Sauce Remoulade:
1 pint Mayonnaise
1 ounce Capers, drained and chopped
1 ounce Cornichons, chopped
1/2 cup Fresh Chives, chopped
1/2 cup Fresh Chervil, chopped
1/2 cup Fresh Tarragon, chopped
1/2 tbsp Dijon Mustard
Salt and Pepper, to taste
Worcestershire Sauce
Tabasco
Combine all ingredients and mix well.
